description: Style Note Look trendy and stay comfortable in these Apex floaters from puma. This pair can be teamed with cargo shorts and tees for a cool casual look. Product Details Black sandal with synthetic upper with synthetic woven tape straps on the forefoot and ankle attached by a diagonal strap across the midfoot Velcro strap enclosures on the forefoot and on the ankle strap  Logo name on the ankle strap, cat logo on the midfoot diagonal strap and brand name on the pull tab Lightly cushioned lining for better comfort Cushioned foam footbed with hexagonal pattern for all-day comfort Rubber outsole with multi-directional lugs for superior grip Material and Care Synthetic Rub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
